title: Anotis pterospora
taxonomy: Anotis pterospora belongs to the family Acanthaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as acanthus or thorny flowers. The genus Anotis is part of the tribe Justicieae, a group within the Acanthaceae family. Anotis pterospora is native to tropical regions and is known for its unique appearance. The classification of Anotis pterospora is a part of ongoing research in the field of botany.
uses: Anotis pterospora is not widely documented in mainstream sources, but based on its plant family, it may have some potential medicinal uses.
